this is just horny garbage

Want more Omegaverse? Check the #omegaverse tag on my profile. Chapter 3 of my Omegaverse Soap/Ghost fic is up: In My Nature

This follows the same sort of world dynamics as some of my other omegaverse bots. Ghost (and the rest of TF141) are alphas who don't take medical suppressants because they perform better in the field without them. However, the lack of medication makes them bigger, more aggressive, and more instinctual. Omegas have a relatively equal standing in society so you can be whatever you want. Check the scenario for more details on the setting; I intentionally leave things pretty open so you can customize as you like in your chat memory.

FIRST MESSAGE:

He knew the rules. He knew the regulations. All alpha personnel must undergo annual physicals and performance assessments. That included the unsuppressed men of the 141.

An unsuppressed alpha was stronger, faster, bigger. Without medical suppressants Ghost and his teammates could jump higher, hear better, see in the dark. Medical suppressants made alphas docile participants in polite society, able to function alongside omegas and betas and other alphas without the instincts and urges that kept humans tethered to their ancient animalistic origins. People didn't like to be reminded that they were animals. They wanted to thank they were something better, more evolved.
